source: NvChad - Marksman: the snippet activation keys Marksman adds to the completion widgets

questions.q: Typing h then a number (e.g. h4) inserts...
options: that many hash marks and a space for a heading (h1 to h6)
questions.why: h4 + Enter inserts four # and a space, ready for the title.

questions.q: What do the b and i snippets do?
options: b = bold (four asterisks); i = italic (two asterisks)
questions.why: b inserts **** for bold, i inserts ** for italic, cursor in the middle.
link builds the [text](url) structure (with path autocomplete).

options: a blockquote tag (> followed by a space)
questions.why: q inserts the > citation tag and positions the cursor.

questions.q: Which snippet inserts a fenced code block (triple backticks plus a language)?
questions.why: codeblock inserts the fenced block; code inserts inline (double) backticks.

questions.q: How do you navigate the completion widget to pick a Marksman snippet?
questions.why: Use Tab to move through the widget entries.

options: quickly creates a table structure (choice of starting layouts)
